summary: Excellent matrix capture of an all‑time great show highlighted by a jaw‑dropping Box of Rain vocal and a soaring Truckin' jam.
review: Both reviewers praise this recording as a splendid matrix, noting the blend of crisp soundboard clarity with the ambient delay‑tower echo that gives it character. The performance is described as one of the Dead's greatest ever, with Phil Lesh’s lead vocal on Box of Rain and an expansive Truckin' jam standing out as show‑highlights.

ai_rating.rationale: Two detailed 5‑star reviews consistently highlight a top‑tier performance and a high‑quality matrix recording, giving strong confidence in an excellent overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Splendid matrix; snappy soundboard combined with delay‑tower echo can feel slightly odd at times but adds character rather than detracting from clarity.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Described as one of the Dead's all‑time greatest shows with high energy, seamless transitions and plenty of moments that make listeners “boogie”.

band_member_comments.Phil: Lead vocal on Box of Rain described as jaw‑dropping.
